🍹 Drinks & WiFi — What You Need to Know

Onboard drink and WiFi packages can add $300–$2,000+ for your trip depending on cruise line and choices. Key rule: all adults in the same cabin must purchase the same drink package — so Davette and Aiden must match. Logan (10) uses a kids/soda package.

⚓
Royal Caribbean
Wonder · Freedom · Utopia of the Seas
🍸 Drink Packages
Deluxe Beverage
~$70–125/day + 18% grat
Full bar, premium cocktails, wine, beer, specialty coffees. No daily cap. All adults in cabin must purchase together.
Refreshment (non-alcoholic)
~$29–42/day + 18% grat
Sodas, juices, premium coffees, smoothies, milkshakes. Good option for Aiden.
Classic Soda
~$10–18/day + 18% grat
Fountain sodas. Perfect for Logan (10).
📶 WiFi — VOOM (Starlink)
Surf + Stream
~$22/day pre-cruise
Powered by Starlink — fastest Wi-Fi at sea. Handles video calls and streaming. Priced per device; purchase one per person.
💡 Tip: Buy Pre-Cruise
WiFi is ~30% cheaper when purchased before boarding vs. onboard (~$33/day). Pre-purchase drink packages too for same savings.
💡 Advisor Tip: Packages work at CocoCay private island — great full-day value since drinks flow all day on the island. Pre-purchase online to save 20–30%.
👨‍👩‍👦 Your Family: Davette + Aiden must match — both Deluxe or both Refreshment. Logan gets Classic Soda. If Aiden isn't drinking, Refreshment saves significantly vs Deluxe.
View Royal Caribbean Packages →
🚢
MSC Cruises
MSC Seashore · MSC Seaside
🍸 Drink Packages
Premium Extra
~$85/day, grat incl.
Top-shelf spirits, cocktails, wine, beer. 15-drink daily cap — most restrictive of all four lines.
Alcohol-Free
~$33/day
Mocktails, sodas, juices, smoothies. Solid and affordable option for Aiden.
Minors Package
~$22/day
Sodas, juices, water. Designed for Logan (10).
📶 WiFi
Browse & Stream
~$16–23/device/day
Per-device pricing — purchase separately for each family member who needs connectivity.
⚠️ 15-Drink Daily Cap: MSC enforces the strictest limit of all four cruise lines. If you or Aiden drink more than 15 beverages a day, this cap will be a frustration.
👨‍👩‍👦 Your Family: Davette + Aiden must match. Alcohol-Free for Aiden is a smart cost-saver if he's not drinking. Logan's Minors package is excellent value at $22/day.
View MSC Packages →
🎉
Carnival
Carnival Celebration
🍸 Drink Packages
CHEERS!
~$84/day, grat incl.
15-drink daily cap. Starts Day 2 from Miami (Day 1 not covered). Does not work at Half Moon Cay private island.
Zero Proof (non-alcoholic)
~$36/day
Mocktails, premium coffees, sodas. Good option for Aiden.
Bottomless Bubbles
~$8/day (kids)
Sodas only. Great for Logan (10) at just $8/day.
⭐ Ultimate Value Package
~$90/day
Bundles CHEERS! + Premium WiFi + other perks. Best deal if you want both drinks and internet.
📶 WiFi
Social Plan
$19/day
Social media only.
Value / Premium
$24–$25.50/day
Full browsing and streaming. Premium included in Ultimate Value Package.
⚠️ Miami Departure Note: CHEERS! doesn't activate until Day 2, so you pay out-of-pocket on embarkation day. Package also doesn't cover Half Moon Cay private island.
👨‍👩‍👦 Your Family: Davette + Aiden must match. The Ultimate Value Package (~$90/day) bundles CHEERS! + Premium WiFi — often cheaper than buying separately.
View Carnival Packages →
🌊
Norwegian Cruise Line
Norwegian Getaway · Norwegian Prima
🍸 Free at Sea Packages
Free at Sea — Unlimited Bar
+$28.50/day service charge
Unlimited drinks with no daily cap. Included "free" with most bookings — you just pay the daily gratuity add-on.
⭐ Free at Sea Plus (FAS+)
+$49.99/day
Upgraded premium spirits + unlimited WiFi + specialty dining credits + gratuities included. Best all-in value if you want drinks and WiFi.
Kids Soda & Juice
~$12.50/day
Sodas and juices for Logan (10).
📶 WiFi
Included with FAS+
Unlimited WiFi bundled into the Free at Sea Plus package — one of the best deals if you're upgrading anyway.
À la Carte
Available separately per device/day if not using FAS+.
⚠️ Great Stirrup Cay (March 2026): Standard Free at Sea packages no longer valid at NCL's private island. You'll need FAS+ for drinks to work on the island.
👨‍👩‍👦 Your Family: FAS+ at $49.99/day covers Davette + Aiden with premium drinks, WiFi, dining credits, and island coverage. Likely the best all-in value if you sail NCL.
View Norwegian Free at Sea →
💡 All prices are starting fares per person for interior cabins. Taxes, port fees, gratuities & onboard packages are additional. Prices and availability verified for August 2026 — please confirm directly with each cruise line before booking. August is peak summer season; book early for best cabin selection! 🛳️
